chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2096 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.10115/2023 3. For hearing of main case 14-04-2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent department The Commissioner Inland Revenue Sukkur Zone, RTO Sukkur has filed comments which are taken on record. Learned counsel for the department states that the petitioner is an active taxpayer and has remained so in the tenure of the present facts. In view hereof the controversy appears to have been resolved and the respondent No.3 may give effect thereto inter alia by issuance of revised bill etc. The petition stands disposed of in the said terms. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
